name: Flight Deck Social
tagline: Digital darts, shareable food flights, and an aviation-themed night out.
thesis: Flight Deck Social is an aviation-inspired restaurant and social gaming venue built around reservable digital dart bays. Guests form crews, order tasting flights designed for sharing, and play fast, beginner-friendly dart games with automatic scoring. The first location should focus on a tight evening menu, strong group reservations, visible competition, and service built to keep food and drinks moving without interrupting play.
audience: Groups, date nights, celebrations, and company outings looking for an interactive alternative to a standard bar.
proofPoints: The core experience pairs reservable digital dart bays with automatic scoring, short game formats, and crew leaderboards.
The menu reinforces the concept with slider trios, french fry flights, wing flights, dessert flights, and coordinated drink flights.
Aviation design creates a complete world: departure-board menus, runway lighting, gate-numbered bays, and boarding-pass checks.

launchChecks.label: Define one flagship layout with 6–10 visible dart bays, a central bar, and clear service lanes
Prototype one digital dart bay and test the game, ordering, and table-turn workflow with invited groups
Validate menu flights, reservation demand, safety procedures, alcohol-service rules, and location economics
